Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Start_Your_Business.asp

# Need starting business before APEX route

Review date: 2026-06-28

## User intent
The user wants government contracts but has not legally formed or is idea-stage.

## Best primary route
Do not route primarily to APEX yet. Route to SBDC for startup advising and SCORE for mentoring; return to APEX after formation and readiness.

## Ask first
- Have you legally formed the business yet?
- What ZIP/county will the business operate from?
- What product or service will you eventually sell to government?

## Recommended response pattern
1. Acknowledge contracting goal.
2. Explain APEX usually fits formed for-profit businesses.
3. Route to SBDC/SCORE for startup preparation.
4. Give return-to-APEX readiness step.

## Example BOSS response
Because APEX is mainly for formed, for-profit businesses preparing to sell to government, start with SBDC or SCORE to clarify and form the business.
